webpage.para: This page documents our goals and requested features for our 0.4 release. We need help!

listitem.para: Make the current version stable and bug free.

section.title: Make It Stable
section.para: Validate the current release on various platforms (GNU/Linux, Unix, Windows, Mac OS) and make sure that is bug free and stable.

listitem.para: If style sheets are not supported by the browser, make sure the content is still readable and usable.
Make sure that users can skip repetitive navigation links.
Provide a better support for acronyms. (Done)

section.title: Support Atom
section.para: Current release only covers RSS 1.0. Also provide support for for Atom.

section.title: Polish User Guide Documentation
section.para: Make sure the User Guide is up-to-date.
